professional_summary: AI/ML Engineer and Researcher with expertise in Generative AI (RAG, Agentic AI), Computer Vision, and scalable document processing. Experienced in architecting legal research platforms and real-time ergonomic assessment systems.

description: Architected a Generative AI legal research platform using LangChain and PostgreSQL to execute RAG pipelines.
Developed autonomous Agentic AI systems via OpenAI Agent Builder to automate client-lawyer matchmaking.
Engineered scalable document processing and agent orchestration workflows using N8N, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot.
Containerized AI features using Docker and managed model deployment via Git and Jenkins.
Led the lifecycle for a multi-agent GenAI system, defining technical roadmaps for Python and LangChain backend integrations.
Managed Salesforce data alignment strategies to streamline lead management between AI agents and CRM platforms.
Directed cross-functional technical pods in Agile/Jira environments to launch 4 features for an Agentic AI marketplace.
Co-designed a real-time Computer Vision ergonomic assessment system using MoveNet Lightning, TensorFlow, and OpenCV.
Optimized Pose Estimation pipelines using OpenCV pre-processing, increasing model accuracy by 15%.
Secured ₹90,000 SSIP funding and presented research at IEA 2024.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
